not_promoted: Template only; actual Claude Code host smoke evidence has not been produced.
Convert this template to a channel-smoke-plan with concrete host commands before running the smoke runner.

clean_environment.purpose: Prove the smoke runs from a clean Claude Code profile/workspace with no prior Eve state influencing the result.
command_template: operator-run
Create a clean HOME/XDG profile, confirm no existing Eve/Claude Code config state, and record the profile path.

entry_url.purpose: Prove the hosted Claude Code installer entrypoint preserves the claude-code-plugin install_source.
command_template: operator-run
Fetch ${EVE_PACK12_TARGET}/install?install_source=claude-code-plugin and confirm INSTALL_SOURCE, eve config set-install-source claude-code-plugin, and source-tagged connect output.

install_or_import.purpose: Install and enable the Eve Memory Claude Code plugin through the actual Claude Code plugin mechanism or approved repo-distributed plugin path.
command_template: operator-run
Install and enable the plugin in the clean Claude Code profile and confirm Claude Code lists/loads eve-memory@eve-memory from the installed plugin location.

connect.purpose: Connect the installed Claude Code environment to Eve using the production-supported auth path.
command_template: operator-run
Run eve connect --tool claude-code --install-source claude-code-plugin in the clean profile and verify MCP connectivity.

store.purpose: Store a synthetic Pack 12 smoke memory from the connected Claude Code environment.
command_template: operator-run
Use Claude Code's connected Eve MCP tool to store a unique synthetic memory containing ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

read.purpose: Read back the synthetic smoke memory from the same connected Claude Code environment.
command_template: operator-run
Use Claude Code's plugin-namespaced Eve MCP memory_search tool with store=semantic to retrieve the synthetic memory containing ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

forget.purpose: Forget the synthetic smoke memory and prove cleanup completes.
command_template: operator-run
Use Claude Code's Eve MCP forget/delete path to remove the synthetic smoke memory and confirm it no longer appears in read/search.

install_source_flow.purpose: Prove claude-code-plugin attribution reaches local config and hosted signup/first-memory attribution.
command_template: operator-run
Inspect local Eve config plus server-side event/metric evidence and confirm install_source=claude-code-plugin is preserved.

connector_install_completed.purpose: Exercise and verify the connector.install.completed event for the Claude Code plugin channel.
command_template: operator-run
Trigger connector.install.completed for claude-code-plugin through the authenticated product path and verify the audit/metric event.

rollback_or_uninstall.purpose: Remove the plugin/config from the clean Claude Code profile and prove rollback leaves no active Eve channel state.
command_template: operator-run
Run the documented plugin uninstall/rollback path in the clean profile and verify Eve-managed Claude Code config is absent.
